intro: Tibetia tongolensis, also known as Tibetan cotton, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Tibet and other parts of Asia. The health benefits of Tibetia tongolensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Tibetia tongolensis include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
